title: Wan2.2 RunPod Serverless Worker
description: ComfyUI-based Wan2.2 image-to-video serverless worker using the basic.json workflow. Requests provide staged prompt tuples, image input, optional output path, and model overrides for Wan, VAE, CLIP, and LoRAs.

config.gpuIds: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
